reviews.comment:
Me atendieron de inmediato en el Taller . Unico detalle negativo me pareció caro $ 1.500 para scanner del motor siendo socio del ACA El mecanico señor Patricio fue muy cordial y explico con sabiduría el inconveniente encontrado

(Translated by Google)
I was attended to immediately at the workshop. My only negative point was the high price of $1,500 for the engine scanner, especially considering I'm an ACA member. The mechanic, Mr. Patricio, was very friendly and explained the problem very well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzak9DU0VREAE

reviews.comment:
Me acerqué para solicitar ir al baño y estaban con llave. Se nos informó que sólo se pueden utilizar de día..

(Translated by Google)
I went to ask to use the bathroom, and it was locked. We were told it was only open during the day.
